name: Town Hall Meeting
text:
The table votes recall or status quo. Each player votes once for each Voter they control, plus once for themselves.
Recall — Each opponent who controls more permanents than you sacrifices a creature.
Status quo — You draw a card and create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token. (Nothing got decided, but you networked.)
flavorText: Scheduled for 7. Started at 7:40. Ended never.
